name: create_mandate
description: Create a direct debit mandate in GoCardless, which is an authorization from a customer to collect payments from their bank account. The mandate is linked to a customer bank account and must be verified before payments can be collected. Different schemes (SEPA, Bacs, ACH) have different mandate flows.

parameters.name: links[customer_bank_account]
parameters.description: The ID of the customer bank account to set up the mandate against (starts with 'BA').

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Key-value pairs to store custom data with the mandate. Max 3 keys.

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: A bank reference for this mandate. If not provided, GoCardless will auto-generate one.

parameters.name: links[creditor]
parameters.description: The ID of the creditor. Only needed if you have multiple creditors.
